stemHtml: You depart point A at 12:15 and begin a planned route of 80 NM. Your initial heading is 235º. At 12:27 you pass a rail track crossing your path at 90º after travelling 40 NM. At 12:33 the pilot realizes he/she is 4 NM to the left of the intended track. What heading should you fly to reach your intended destination and what will be your ETA?
